flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Washburn University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $9.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washburn University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Washburn University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0k → 4.6k).
